name: document-intake-tools
description: Document and meeting intake skills for classifying meeting files, gathering local context, and routing outputs to draft, update, or finalize workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Classify meeting files, gather context, and route document outputs.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin with skills for meeting type classification, context discovery from local repositories, artifact lifecycle routing, and drafting meeting outputs for product or project workflows.
defaultPrompt: Classify this meeting transcript and ask only the context questions needed.
Find local documents that may be relevant to this meeting.
Route this transcript to draft, update, or finalize the right artifact.
Create a Slack-ready meeting summary from this transcript.
